title: Documentation Metadata
description: Schema for docs/metadata.yml. Validates the documentation manifest that governs relationships, portability, and AI-first lookup across all documentation.

foundation.description: Foundational documents loaded into every AI context.

topics.description: Topic documentation organized by technology, tool, or domain.

prompts.description: AI prompt definitions for automated tasks.

id.description: Unique identifier across all sections. Used in depends_on and required_by.

path.description: File path relative to the docs/ directory.

load.description: When to load this document into AI context. 'always' loads every session. 'documentation' loads only when the task involves writing, editing, reviewing, or restructuring files under docs/.

spec.description: File path to the foundation spec, relative to the docs/ directory.

files.description: Sub-files for foundation entries, relative to the docs/ directory.

depends_on.description: IDs of documents this entry depends on.

required_by.description: IDs of documents that depend on this entry.

id.description: Unique identifier across all sections. Used in depends_on and required_by.

path.description: File path to the product document, relative to the docs/ directory.

load.description: When to load this document into AI context. 'always' loads every session. 'documentation' loads only for documentation tasks.

spec.description: File path to the product spec, relative to the docs/ directory.

depends_on.description: IDs of documents this entry depends on.

required_by.description: IDs of documents that depend on this entry.

id.description: Unique identifier across all sections. Used in depends_on and required_by.

path.description: File path to the topic README.md, relative to the docs/ directory.

spec.description: File path to the topic spec, relative to the docs/ directory.

depends_on.description: IDs of documents this topic depends on.

required_by.description: IDs of documents that depend on this topic.

files.description: Sub-files for concordance topics, relative to the docs/ directory. Empty array for single-file topics.

id.description: Unique identifier across all sections. Used in depends_on and required_by.

path.description: File path to the prompt README.md, relative to the docs/ directory.

depends_on.description: IDs of documents this prompt depends on.

required_by.description: IDs of documents that depend on this prompt.
